front.title: IOAM Trace-Type Extensions for Path bandwidth

abstract.t: Traffic scheduling and optimization have become routine network operation and maintenance tasks for operators. The operators need to select a path that can accommodate the capacity of the traffic to be scheduled. In situ Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (IOAM) is used for recording and collecting operational and telemetry information. This document defines two bit flags within IOAM Trace- Type for carrying bandwidth information.
